impacts.statement: Many businesses, homes, and several thousand acres of agricultural land within several miles of the river are inundated.
There is extensive flooding of farm and agricultural land. Several access roads are also underwater. Many businesses and residents near the river are affected by high water.
There is widespread flooding of farm and agricultural land. Some local access roads are also under water.
Minor flooding is occurring along the State Highway 14 bridge.
Several hundred acres of farm and agricultural land are inundated near the State Highway 14 bridge.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
